informal_pl: Cosinus jako Re(exp(i·x)); konstrukcja korzysta z log(i) = iπ/2 i log(x) = log|x| dla x>0.
informal_en: Cosine as Re(exp(i·x)); construction uses log(i) = iπ/2 and log(x) = log|x| for x>0.
lean_target_signature: theorem emlterm1c_for_cos : ∃ t : EMLTermℂ₁, ∀ x : ℝ, 0 < x → (EMLTermℂ₁.eval (x : ℂ) t).re = Real.cos x := by sorry
notes: Round 2 chunk; Table S2 step 24. SEALED 2026-04-27 via Euler. SPEC TIGHTENED to x > 0: the construction uses Complex.log((x:ℂ)) = (Real.log x : ℂ) which holds only for x ≥ 0. Witness shape: cosTerm := mkEXP (mkEXP (mkADD (mkLOG iTerm) (mkLOG var))). For x > 0, eval = exp(exp(log(I) + log(x))) = exp(I·x). Re = cos(x). iTerm reuses chunk 035's Sub(M, ExpT NegI) construction (closed term ⇒ Complex.I). mkADD is the chunk-040 combinator with explicit branch-cut hypotheses bundled in an `ADDsafe` structure. Earlier 'STRUCTURAL BLOCKER' claim was wrong — Euler's identity gives a path. ~628 lines, lake env lean exit 0, 0 active sorries.
